# idm\_course

Course materials for Intermediate Deterministic Models (USCGA course)

**⚠️ Do not edit files in your local copy of this repository.**  
**Copy anything you want to work on into your own workspace.**


Right now this just has sample content in it.  

Eventually the plan is for this to hold all of the real content.



**Note:**

* Use `prof-frommer` GitHub account on cga laptop - windows explorer, git desktop, and GitHub.com using **Edge**
* Use `ifrommer` GitHub account on testing machines - **SurfacePro**, **HP at CGA**, etc.  



See **Issues** then later remove all Issues when deploying the course.
